# A theorem on affine invariance of transformed sensitivity indices

## Abstract

We prove an affine invariance theorem for transformed sensitivity indices and provide a
counterexample for nonlinear transforms.

## Introduction

The manuscript studies a mathematical property of variance-based sensitivity analysis.

## Proof

Theorem 1 states the main result. Lemma 1 provides the midpoint argument. Proposition 1
completes the proof.

## Discussion

The proof clarifies the conditions under which transformed indices commute.

- Example reference.
